content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 
Sarah Carrillo 
County Counsel 
2 South Green Street 
Sonora, California 95370 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. W-13-085 
Dear Ms. Carrillo: 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax. (916) 322-0886 
July 3, 2013 
This letter responds to your request for advice regarding your agency's Connict of 
Interest Code under the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 After our conversation on July 3, 
2013, you agreed to the withdrawal of your request for advice. Also, as we discussed, we have 
forwarded your request for code review to the proper party within our agency and your advice 
request has been withdrawn. 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
HMW:jgl 
Sincerely, 
Zackery P. Morazzini 
General Counsel 
By: 
Heather M. Rowan 
Senior Counsel, Legal Di vision 
1 The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 9101-L All statutory 
references arc to the Government Code. unles!> otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices 
Commission arc contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code or Regulations. All 
regulatory references arc to Title 2. Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations. unless otherwise indicated.

sections.question_synthetic: The requester sought advice regarding a county agency's Conflict of Interest Code under the Political Reform Act, but subsequently agreed to withdraw the request.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC confirmed withdrawal of the advice request and noted that the code review request has been forwarded to the appropriate party within the agency.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no traditional QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document confirms mutual agreement to withdraw after July 3, 2013 conversation. Request for code review was referred to appropriate FPPC division.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC confirmed withdrawal of the advice request and noted that the code review request has been forwarded to the appropriate party within the agency.

embedding.summary: This is a withdrawal letter where the FPPC confirms that Sarah Carrillo, County Counsel, agreed to withdraw her request for advice regarding her agency's Conflict of Interest Code. The FPPC has forwarded the code review request to the proper internal party.
